channel.title: PC Game Guides on DungeonPath — Free Game Guides & Walkthroughs
channel.description: Recent content in PC Game Guides on DungeonPath — Free Game Guides & Walkthroughs

item.title: Palworld Weapon & Gear Guide: Best Weapons, Armor Sets & Upgrade Materials (2026)
item.description: Complete Palworld weapon and gear guide: best weapons by tier, armor set bonuses, upgrade material farming locations, and crafting recipes for endgame equipment.

item.title: Pressure Hidden Areas & Easter Eggs Guide: Secret Rooms, Glitches & Rare Encounters (2026)
item.description: Pressure hidden areas and Easter eggs guide: secret room locations, hidden entity encounters, glitch discoveries, rare item spawns, and Easter egg triggers.

item.title: Rivals Team Composition Guide: Best Lineups, Role Synergies & Counter Picks (2026)
item.description: Rivals team composition guide: best team lineups for each map, role synergy combinations, counter-picking strategies, and ranked team coordination tips.

item.title: Sailor Piece Crew & Ship Guide: Best Crewmates, Ship Types & Sea Navigation (2026)
item.description: Complete Sailor Piece crew and ship guide: best crewmate combinations, ship types and upgrades, sea navigation routes, and crew management strategies.

item.title: Tower Defense Simulator Co-op Guide: Multiplayer Strategies, Communication & Team Tower Placements (2026)
item.description: Tower Defense Simulator co-op guide: multiplayer tower coordination, communication strategies, team role assignments, and optimal tower placement for group play.
